display_text: Ceremonial Robe, Cost: 0: Non-purchasable aura item. Lowers enemy Status Resistance and Magic Resistance by 10% for all enemies within a 1200 unit radius. Provides no direct combat stats, offering a purely offensive team fight debuff to weaken enemy defenses.
search_text: aura item, debuff aura, status resistance reduction, magic resistance reduction, team fight aura, resistance reduction, AoE debuff, weaken enemy, offensive aura, Ceremonial Robe
